name: MSTSC Shadowing Detected (No Consent)
description: Highly suspicious use of mstsc.exe to shadow another RDP session without user consent, indicating potential lateral movement, reconnaissance, or surveillance.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the mstsc.exe process creation.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the mstsc.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of mstsc.exe, including 'noconsentprompt' and 'shadow:'.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that launched mstsc.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which mstsc.exe was executed (the potential attacker).

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the mstsc.exe process was created.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.

parameters.name: TargetUser
parameters.description: The user whose RDP session was targeted for shadowing (if determinable from logs/enrichment).
